purpose: Validate that Product Director LF returns a self-repair verdict when acceptance criteria are vague, not testable or only written as intentions.

input.product_objective: Define a product block that improves user clarity.
input.target_user_state: User is deciding whether to continue to the next flow.
input.problem_to_solve: The current brief says the experience should be clear, useful and premium but does not define observable criteria.
input.decision_required: Turn the brief into a usable Product Direction Spec.
constraints: handoff must be usable by UX/UI and Copy
input.expected_closure: Return self-repair because criteria are vague

blocking_conditions: acceptance criteria vague or not testable
